name: Long-horizon bait interruption 001
objective: Sequence lower-commitment plays before exposing the key pressure line to interaction.

preserve: highest-value summon until safe pressure is available
avoid: committing key card before checking response windows

successConditions: Player 0 keeps a playable follow-up after response windows appear.
failureConditions: Player 0 loses the key line to the first interaction window.
notes: Tests whether the model considers interruption risk explicitly.
